## Issue: [BACKEND-01] Implement Common Package Shared Types

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Small
**Priority:** High (Blocking for all backend and frontend work)

**Description:**
Create shared TypeScript type definitions and constants in the `packages/common/` package that will be used by both backend and frontend for backup/restore functionality. This ensures type consistency across the entire application.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create `packages/common/src/types/backup.ts` with all backup-related interfaces
- [ ] Create `packages/common/src/constants/backup.ts` with shared constants
- [ ] Export types from `packages/common/src/index.ts`
- [ ] Types include: `BackupStatus`, `IBackupConfig`, `IBackupStatus`, `IBackupImage`, `IImageValidation`, `IImageMetadata`
- [ ] All enums and constants are properly documented with JSDoc comments

**Dependencies:** None

**Technical Notes:**
- Reference API design doc sections on Data Structures (lines 347-404)
- Shared types prevent duplication between backend and frontend
- Follow existing patterns in `packages/common/src/types/`
- Use `export interface` and `export enum` for better tree-shaking

**Files to Create:**
- `packages/common/src/types/backup.ts`
- `packages/common/src/constants/backup.ts`

## Issue: [BACKEND-02] Implement BackupApiService

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** High (Blocking for API endpoints)

**Description:**
Implement the `BackupApiService` class that handles interactions with Kubernetes APIs to query backup configuration and status. This service encapsulates all Kubernetes operations related to backup status monitoring.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create `BackupApiService` class in `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/backupApi.ts`
- [ ] Implement `getClusterBackupConfig()` method using CustomObjectAPI for DevWorkspaceOperatorConfig
- [ ] Implement `getWorkspaceBackupStatus()` method that queries Job status and aggregates data
- [ ] Implement `listBackupJobs()` method using BatchV1API
- [ ] Parse cron expressions to calculate next scheduled backup time
- [ ] Add comprehensive error handling using `createError()` helper
- [ ] Unit tests achieve >90% code coverage

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types

**Technical Notes:**
- Follow existing service patterns from `devWorkspaceApi.ts` and `serverConfigApi.ts`
- Use `CustomObjectAPI` for DevWorkspaceOperatorConfig (group: `controller.devfile.io`)
- Use `BatchV1API` from @kubernetes/client-node for Job queries
- Filter Jobs by label: `controller.devfile.io/devworkspace-name={workspaceName}`
- Reference backend architecture analysis lines 203-252 for patterns
- Reference API design doc lines 20-43 for interface definition

**Files to Create:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/backupApi.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/__tests__/backupApi.spec.ts`

**Files to Modify:**

## Issue: [BACKEND-03] Implement Registry Adapter Pattern and OpenShift Adapter

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Large
**Priority:** High (Blocking for backup discovery)

**Description:**
Implement the registry adapter pattern with the OpenShift ImageStream adapter for MVP. This allows the backend to query container registry APIs to discover backup images and extract metadata.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create `IRegistryAdapter` interface defining adapter contract
- [ ] Implement `OpenShiftRegistryAdapter` class using ImageStream API
- [ ] Implement `RegistryAdapterFactory` with cluster detection and adapter selection logic
- [ ] OpenShift adapter queries ImageStream and ImageStreamTag APIs
- [ ] Parse image labels to extract workspace metadata (devworkspace-name, namespace, timestamp)
- [ ] Implement image accessibility validation via manifest queries
- [ ] Add comprehensive error handling for registry API failures
- [ ] Unit tests with mocked ImageStream API responses achieve >90% coverage

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types

**Technical Notes:**
- Reference API design doc lines 60-87 for adapter pattern
- OpenShift adapter uses: `/apis/image.openshift.io/v1/namespaces/{ns}/imagestreams`
- Query ImageStreamTag for detailed label information
- Filter images by label: `controller.devfile.io/devworkspace-name`
- Factory pattern detects OpenShift via cluster info and registry URL patterns
- Phase 2 will add GenericOCIRegistryAdapter - design interface to support both
- Reference backend architecture analysis lines 467-486 for implementation guidance

**Files to Create:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/helpers/registryAdapters/IRegistryAdapter.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/helpers/registryAdapters/OpenShiftRegistryAdapter.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/helpers/registryAdapters/RegistryAdapterFactory.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/helpers/registryAdapters/__tests__/OpenShiftRegistryAdapter.spec.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/helpers/registryAdapters/__tests__/RegistryAdapterFactory.spec.ts`

## Issue: [BACKEND-04] Implement RegistryApiService with Caching

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** High (Blocking for backup discovery)

**Description:**
Implement the `RegistryApiService` class that provides a high-level API for backup image discovery and validation, with in-memory caching to optimize performance.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create `RegistryApiService` class using adapter pattern from [BACKEND-03]
- [ ] Implement `listBackupImages()` method with pagination support
- [ ] Implement `validateBackupImage()` method for image accessibility checks
- [ ] Implement `getImageMetadata()` method to retrieve labels and timestamp
- [ ] Add in-memory cache with 5-minute TTL for `listBackupImages()` results
- [ ] Implement 10-second timeout for registry queries
- [ ] Return cached results with warning on timeout
- [ ] Unit tests achieve >90% coverage including cache behavior

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types
- [BACKEND-03] Registry Adapter Pattern and OpenShift Adapter

**Technical Notes:**
- Use RegistryAdapterFactory to get appropriate adapter instance
- Reference API design doc lines 44-87 for interface and adapter details
- Cache key format: `namespace:{namespace}`
- Implement simple Map-based cache with timestamp tracking
- Environment variable: `BACKUP_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS` (default: 300)
- Environment variable: `REGISTRY_QUERY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` (default: 10)
- Reference API design doc lines 192-198 for performance requirements

**Files to Create:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/registryApi.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/__tests__/registryApi.spec.ts`

**Files to Modify:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/index.ts` (add registryApi getter)
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/types/index.ts` (add IRegistryApi interface)

## Issue: [BACKEND-05] Implement JobApiService with WebSocket Support

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** Medium (Phase 2 - polling fallback sufficient for MVP)

**Description:**
Implement the `JobApiService` class for monitoring Kubernetes Job status with WebSocket support for real-time updates. Follow the pattern established by `PodApiService`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create `JobApiService` class implementing `IJobApi` and `IWatcherService` interfaces
- [ ] Implement `listInNamespace()` method using BatchV1API
- [ ] Implement `getByName()` method to retrieve specific Job
- [ ] Implement `watchInNamespace()` method for WebSocket watching
- [ ] Handle Job status phases: Pending, Running, Succeeded, Failed
- [ ] Parse Job conditions and extract meaningful status information
- [ ] Unit tests achieve >90% coverage

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types

**Technical Notes:**
- Reference `PodApiService` pattern (backend architecture analysis lines 218-228)
- Use `BatchV1API` from @kubernetes/client-node
- Watch path: `/apis/batch/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/jobs`
- Implement IWatcherService interface for WebSocket compatibility
- Reference API design doc lines 89-104 for interface definition
- WebSocket support is Phase 2 - polling fallback via GET /jobs/:jobName/status is MVP

**Files to Create:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/jobApi.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/__tests__/jobApi.spec.ts`

**Files to Modify:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/index.ts` (add jobApi getter)
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/types/index.ts` (add IJobApi interface)

## Issue: [BACKEND-06] Implement Backup API Routes

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Large
**Priority:** High (Blocking for frontend integration)

**Description:**
Implement REST API routes for backup configuration, status, discovery, and validation. This includes 4 new GET endpoints and 1 POST endpoint.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Implement `GET /api/namespace/:namespace/backup-config` endpoint
- [ ] Implement `GET /api/namespace/:namespace/devworkspaces/:workspaceName/backup-status` endpoint
- [ ] Implement `GET /api/namespace/:namespace/backups` endpoint with pagination
- [ ] Implement `POST /api/backup/validate-image` endpoint with URL validation
- [ ] Add JSON schema validation for all request/response bodies
- [ ] Implement proper error handling with specific error codes
- [ ] Register routes in main app.ts
- [ ] Unit tests for all routes achieve >90% coverage

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types
- [BACKEND-02] BackupApiService
- [BACKEND-04] RegistryApiService with Caching

**Technical Notes:**
- Create new file: `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/backups.ts`
- Follow existing route patterns from `devworkspaces.ts`
- Reference API design doc lines 105-243 for endpoint specifications
- Pagination params: `page` (default: 1), `perPage` (default: 50, max: 100)
- Search param: `search` (optional, filter by workspace name)
- Add schemas to `packages/dashboard-backend/src/constants/schemas.ts`
- Error codes: `BACKUP_NOT_CONFIGURED`, `BACKUP_IMAGE_NOT_FOUND`, `REGISTRY_AUTH_FAILED`, `INVALID_IMAGE_URL`, `DEVWORKSPACE_NOT_FOUND`, `REGISTRY_API_ERROR`, `TIMEOUT`
- SSRF protection: validate image URLs, only allow HTTPS or configured trusted registries

**Files to Create:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/backups.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/__tests__/backups.spec.ts`

**Files to Modify:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/app.ts` (register backup routes)
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/constants/schemas.ts` (add validation schemas)

## Issue: [BACKEND-07] Enhance DevWorkspace Creation for Restore

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Small
**Priority:** High (Blocking for restore functionality)

**Description:**
Enhance the existing POST /api/namespace/:namespace/devworkspaces endpoint to accept restore parameters and set appropriate DevWorkspace attributes for backup restoration.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Accept optional `restoreFromBackup` boolean in request body
- [ ] Accept optional `backupImageUrl` string in request body
- [ ] When `restoreFromBackup` is true, set DevWorkspace attribute: `controller.devfile.io/restore-workspace: 'true'`
- [ ] If `backupImageUrl` provided, set attribute: `controller.devfile.io/restore-source-image: {url}`
- [ ] If `backupImageUrl` NOT provided, auto-generate from cluster backup config
- [ ] Auto-generation pattern: `{registry}/{namespace}/{workspaceName}:latest`
- [ ] Validate backup image URL format if provided
- [ ] Update unit tests to cover restore scenarios

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types
- [BACKEND-02] BackupApiService (for getting cluster backup config)

**Technical Notes:**
- Reference API design doc lines 245-278 for specification
- Modify existing file: `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/devworkspaces.ts`
- No separate restore endpoint needed - restore is workspace creation with attributes
- Example auto-generated URL: `image-registry.openshift-image-registry.svc:5000/user-che/my-workspace:latest`
- URL validation: must be valid registry URL format
- Add error handling for invalid image URLs

**Files to Modify:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/devworkspaces.ts` (enhance POST handler)
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/__tests__/devworkspaces.spec.ts` (add restore tests)
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/constants/schemas.ts` (update DevWorkspace schema)

## Issue: [BACKEND-08] Implement Job Status Polling Endpoint

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Small
**Priority:** Medium (Fallback for WebSocket)

**Description:**
Implement a REST endpoint for polling Kubernetes Job status. This serves as a fallback when WebSocket connections are unavailable or blocked.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Implement `GET /api/namespace/:namespace/jobs/:jobName/status` endpoint
- [ ] Query Kubernetes Job by namespace and name
- [ ] Extract and return job phase, times, and conditions
- [ ] Handle Job not found with appropriate error
- [ ] Document recommended polling interval (3-5 seconds)
- [ ] Unit tests achieve >90% coverage

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types
- [BACKEND-05] JobApiService

**Technical Notes:**
- Reference API design doc lines 280-308 for endpoint specification
- Response includes: phase, startTime, completionTime, conditions array
- Job phases: Pending, Running, Succeeded, Failed
- Frontend will poll this endpoint every 3-5 seconds when WebSocket unavailable
- Add to existing `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/backups.ts` file

**Files to Modify:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/backups.ts` (add job status route)
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/__tests__/backups.spec.ts` (add tests)

## Issue: [BACKEND-09] Implement WebSocket Support for Backup Jobs (Phase 2)

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** Low (Phase 2 Enhancement)

**Description:**
Implement WebSocket endpoint for real-time backup/restore job status updates. This provides better UX than polling fallback but is not critical for MVP.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create WebSocket route: `/api/ws/backup-job/:namespace/:jobName`
- [ ] Watch Kubernetes Job resource using Watch API
- [ ] Emit `status-update` events on job status changes
- [ ] Emit `completed` event when job succeeds or fails
- [ ] Auto-close WebSocket connection when job completes
- [ ] Reuse existing WebSocket infrastructure from PodApiService pattern
- [ ] Integration tests verify event emission

**Dependencies:**
- [BACKEND-01] Common Package Shared Types
- [BACKEND-05] JobApiService with WebSocket Support

**Technical Notes:**
- Reference API design doc lines 310-345 for WebSocket specification
- Event types: `status-update` (phase, times), `completed` (status, image URL or error)
- Follow existing WebSocket patterns in `packages/dashboard-backend/src/plugins/webSocket.ts`
- Use JobApiService.watchInNamespace() method
- Phase 2 only - polling fallback (BACKEND-08) is sufficient for MVP

**Files to Create:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/websocket/backupJob.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/websocket/__tests__/backupJob.spec.ts`

**Files to Modify:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/plugins/webSocket.ts` (register backup job channel)

**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** Low (Post-MVP)

- Reference API design doc lines 192-198 for performance requirements
- Performance targets:
  - Backup list endpoint: <2 seconds for 100 images
  - Backup status endpoint: <500ms with cache
  - Cache hit rate: >80% under normal usage
- Use performance profiling tools (Chrome DevTools, clinic.js)
- Test with realistic data volumes matching production usage
